subcodes.first_line: O thou herald of the Covenant! His honor Ibn-i-Abhar, protected and preserved, arrived safely, and will spend a few days in the greatest joy [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان حضرت ابن ابهر محفوظ و مصون وارد و ایامی چند با نهایت روح و
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @study; deepening, @education of children; moral education
